# CWE-821: Incorrect Synchronization (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-821-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"sync"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var cacheMu sync.RWMutex
var tokenCache = map[string]string{}

// Safe: exclusive lock protects write operations to the cache.
func StoreToken(c *gin.Context) {
	key := c.Query("session")
	value := c.Query("token")
	cacheMu.Lock()
	tokenCache[key] = value
	cacheMu.Unlock()
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
